Find all the words to complete each level and progress through increasingly challenging puzzles. Word Search Explorer

Welcome to Word Search Explorer! Journey through themed landscapes while searching for hidden words in letter grids. Find all the words to complete each level and progress through increasingly challenging puzzles. Each level features a unique theme with words hidden horizontally, vertically, diagonally, and even backwards! Use hints wisely and race against time to maximize your score.

Arrow Keys: Navigate selection and grid (during gameplay)
Space: Use a hint to reveal a letter from an unfound word
Enter: Start game / Confirm selection / Continue to next level
Escape: Pause or unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen
